texts: It was a long lived peace in the land
They Burned an pillaged the countrysideà
Until the ôhero of timeö appeared.

The hero of time ded them all with fell run of his spear.
(donÆt ask)
You live in the small, quiet village of New Jersey.
HINT: Click on something to talk/examine
Hello! Uh, I meanà RUFF RUFF!!
Okay, Okay. I give. IÆm a talking dog.
IÆll give you this if you leave me alone.

HAHAHAHA!!
YAH!! TAKE THAT STUPID GOBLINS!!!
ôWe need to talk, come to my room. ItÆs the one to the left.ö
Okay, well, that doesnÆt really matter
IÆve actually called you here for a reasonà

We believe youÆre the
ôHero of timeö
Far, Far to the south, There is a tower,
Which is believed to be the tomb of the last hero.
There you will find your destinyà
Why does this draw so heavily from Zeldaà?
NOTE FROM SHINY: LETS SEE YOU COME UP WITH ANYTHING BETTER!!
You must defeat them before they take over the world!!!
She sure gets her point madeà
You canÆt run from a slug! ThatÆs just not cool!

You canÆt flee from a boss! Duhhà.
Why did I even include that?

TisÆ here ye shall find thÆart destiny.

texts: Step into the lightà if thÆart worthyà
Who dares step into the light?
So the legends are trueàYou are the Hero of timeÖà it is, now your destiny to kill every stinkinÆ goblin.
DonÆt worryà if you die now, your stuff will end up in some museum.
